projectDescription: A browser-based Ultima Online client built on WebAssembly that lets players join free shards instantly without installing anything, with a built-in web assistant, scripting engine, and modding SDK for shard owners.
keyFeatures: Play Ultima Online directly in Chrome via WebAssembly — no installation required
Automatic content delivery via delta-binary patching (VCDIFF) and global CDN
Built-in Web Assistant with React UI for game options, hotkeys, scripting, and item management
Modern Grid Containers with auto-sorting, search, and resizable views
TypeScript / Blockly scripting engine sandboxed per shard rules
Cloud-synced game profiles, macros, and assistant state across devices
Shard Rules system for server owners to control and restrict client features
Web Modding SDK (@classicuo/modding) for building custom React-based UI overlays
Global WebSocket game proxy (30+ regions) replacing direct TCP connections
Discord-based authentication with shard-level identity via WebIdentity packet
publicApiSurface: addEventListener(event, fn, once?) — subscribe to game events (journalEntry, gumpUpdate, playerCreated, etc.)
removeEventListener(listenerId) — unsubscribe from an event
client.say(message, hue?) — send chat message as the player
client.sysMsg(message, hue?) — display system message in chat
client.headMsg(message, serial, hue?) — display overhead message
client.castSpell(id) — cast a spell by ID
client.useSkill(id) — use a skill by ID
client.equipItem(serial) / unequipItem(serial) — equip/unequip items
client.attack(serial) — attack a target
client.fly() / client.land() — toggle gargoyle flight
player.* — async getters for all player stats, resistances, equipped items
setShardRules(flags: ShardRules) — apply shard-level feature rules
addExtraPlayerBody(graphicId, gumpArtId, animId, isFemale, race) — register custom player body
sendWebGumpResponse(serial, serverId, data) — send response to a WebGump
closeWebGump(serial, serverId) — close a WebGump
mountInterfaceRoot(App: React.FC) — mount a React mod overlay into the game UI
useWebGump<T>(type, onUpdate?) — React hook for handling WebGump lifecycle
View — draggable/resizable React container component for mod UIs
ClientManifest / SourceManifest — Zod-validated shard content manifest schemas
ShardRules / shardRulesSchema — Zod schema for shard feature restriction rules
GameProfile / profileSchema — Zod schema for all client game options
Shard / shardSchema — Zod schema for shard registration metadata
sleep(ms) — pause script execution
log(...args) — write to scripting console
exit() — terminate script early
